name: mcp
description: A complete modernization of a legacy C++ console application into a production-ready full-stack web application.

scripts.test:all: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e
scripts.allure:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run allure:generate && npm --prefix frontend run allure:open
scripts.allure:backend: npm --prefix backend run allure:generate && npm --prefix backend run allure:open
